# harvester_kubeovn_ippool (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "harvester_kubeovn_ippool" "example" {
  name   = "example-ippool"
  subnet = "example-subnet"

  ips = [
    "10.0.0.10",
    "10.0.0.20..10.0.0.30",
  ]

  namespaces = [
    "default",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ips` (List of String)
- `name` (String) A unique name
- `subnet` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `namespaces` (List of String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `v4_available_ip_range` (String)
- `v4_available_ips` (String)
- `v4_using_ip_range` (String)
- `v4_using_ips` (String)
- `v6_available_ip_range` (String)
- `v6_available_ips` (String)
- `v6_using_ip_range` (String)
- `v6_using_ips` (String)
